raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Lack of clear press narrative ready for launch", "recommended_fix": "Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting the unique value proposition of the VOLAURA project"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "AZ media landscape", "issue": "Insufficient research on matching outlets for our story", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough research on AZ media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az) to identify the best fit for the VOLAURA project's narrative"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "GITA grant application", "issue": "GITA grant deadline May 27 - application material not ready", "recommended_fix": "Finalize and submit the GITA grant application before the deadline to secure potential funding"}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "Startup competition pipeline", "issue": "Need to explore and prioritize relevant startup competitions (Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, AzInTelecom)", "recommended_fix": "Research and prioritize startup competitions to increase visibility and potential funding opportunities for the VOLAURA project"}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "Founder visibility", "issue": "CEO's LinkedIn presence needs improvement to build toward launch", "recommended_fix": "Enhance the CEO's LinkedIn profile and engage in relevant discussions to boost visibility and credibility"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["memory/atlas/wake.md", "docs/INDEX.md"], "PR_readiness_score": 6}

findings.issue: Lack of clear press narrative ready for launch
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting the unique value proposition of the VOLAURA project

findings.issue: Insufficient research on matching outlets for our story
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough research on AZ media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az) to identify the best fit for the VOLAURA project's narrative

findings.issue: GITA grant deadline May 27 - application material not ready
findings.recommended_fix: Finalize and submit the GITA grant application before the deadline to secure potential funding

findings.issue: Need to explore and prioritize relevant startup competitions (Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, AzInTelecom)
findings.recommended_fix: Research and prioritize startup competitions to increase visibility and potential funding opportunities for the VOLAURA project

findings.issue: CEO's LinkedIn presence needs improvement to build toward launch
findings.recommended_fix: Enhance the CEO's LinkedIn profile and engage in relevant discussions to boost visibility and credibility
